reason: Verified agent messaging and response functionality - sent a math question and confirmed the agent responded with the correct answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents including the target agent "QA-20260429-162029-1uoh"
Clicked the "QA-20260429-162029-1uoh" agent in the sidebar — Agent details page opened successfully with the agent name, status indicator, and message input field visible
Verified agent status — Status indicator shows "idle" which meets the requirement (should be "running" or "idle")
Clicked on the message input field — Input field became focused and ready for text entry
Typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input — Message was successfully entered in the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully; agent status changed to "working" and an activity indicator appeared
Waited up to 180 seconds for a response — Agent responded in approximately 2 seconds with the response visible in the chat
Verified response contains "4" — Response clearly displays "4" in the chat message area, confirming correct mathematical calculation
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and response "4" clearly visible
